pageContext.name: Hordak & Imp
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Hordak & Imp!   From Masters of the Universe, this Hordak & Imp Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Masters of the Universe fans, don't miss your chance to add the Hordak statue to your Masters of the Universe collection!
